god_ray_T064.visual_assessment: The god ray sprite above the cliff horizon adds atmospheric depth to the main menu. The warm gold 0xffd090 contrasts well with the cold blue FogExp2(0x1a2030) and blue-gray storm light. The 3s opacity pulse (0.15..0.45) is subtle enough to feel like natural light variation rather than a UI element. The slight z-tilt (0.18rad) gives it a natural angle as if filtering through clouds. AdditiveBlending + depthWrite:false are correct for volumetric light simulation without z-fighting.
god_ray_T064.position_review: (-5, 14, -18) places it above and behind the cliff, in the upper-center of the camera view from (-8,18,28). Scale 12×22 provides a broad but not overwhelming glow. Effect is most visible against the dark sky geometry.
god_ray_T064.score: 8.0/10 — solid atmospheric addition. No texture needed at this scale; the flat color quad with additive blending reads as a light shaft. Improvement: consider adding 2-3 smaller secondary rays at offset angles in future cycle.

cards_T077.effect_caps: PASS — HEAL_LIFE max=5, DAMAGE_LIFE max=5, ADD_REPUTATION max=18
cards_T077.narrative_quality: Cards follow foret_broceliande theme well: yew trees, druids, white wolves, glowing springs, bards, Merlin himself. Thematic coherence high. No duplicate verbs detected within the batch. Mix of combat/exploration/spiritual choices appropriate for the biome.
cards_T077.balance_assessment: Druides-heavy (47%) appropriate for the primary druidic biome. ankou at 10% adds darkness without dominating. The inclusion of a Merlin encounter card is a strong narrative anchor for the biome identity.
cards_T077.risk: LOW — all verbs drawn from established pool, no effects exceed caps

scene_transition_T065.notes: SceneTransition.ts fully functional. cutToBlack/revealFromBlack used actively by main.ts. No changes needed.

analysis.overall_assessment: Cycle 30 delivers the final planned VFX element (god ray) plus 20 new narrative cards for foret_broceliande. The menu scene now has its full VFX suite: animated ocean + foam patches + sea spray + god ray. Card pool grows to 386 with a well-balanced new batch. All open tasks from the original backlog are now complete.
open_tasks_remaining: Backlog appears fully implemented — recommend new task planning cycle
